## ⚡ Perf: Performance Optimization
Improvements regarding speed or resource usage.

### 📝 Description
Optimized [specific process] to reduce execution time/memory usage.

### 🛠️ Changes Details
- Added Eager Loading (`with()`) to fix N+1 query issue.
- Implemented Redis caching for heavy queries.

### ✅ Verification
- [ ] Application builds without errors (`php artisan optimize:clear`).
- [ ] All automated tests passed (`php artisan test`) on local environment.
- [ ] Test verified on local environment.
- [ ] Changes do not affect business logic or features.
- [ ] Load time reduced by [X]ms.
- [ ] Memory usage decreased.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable).
